raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX pm I received an email that there was fraud on my account. I was at the dentist, as soon as I arrived home at XXXX I called Citi and reported the fraud. As I was on the phone with Citi the 2nd transaction posted on my account.

Citi has cancelled the card and issued a new one as well as started a fraud investigation. I have no knowledge of these transactions, they were not authorized by me. 

XX/XX/XXXX {$2500.00} XXXX pm XX/XX/XXXX {$6300.00} XXXX pm - posted to my account as I was on the phone with agent. 

Total {$8800.00} XX/XX/XXXX filed police report with XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX Citi reported the balance on my credit report
